summary: Phase G.1b Quiet Hours — full backend (pytest) + frontend (Playwright) verification. 31/31 backend pytest pass (9 quiet-hours + 13 notif-centre G.1 regression + 9 notif-extra). Frontend QuietHoursPanel + bundled-for-digest banner + held-for-digest chips + active-now pill + active banner all render correctly with required data-testids and supportive copy. No regressions detected.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/backend/server.py is very large (verified via grep ~10560 lines for QH section). Future iterations should split routers into modular files (notif_centre_router.py, quiet_hours_router.py) — not blocking for this iteration but file size is past the 700-line guideline.

agent_to_agent_context_note flagged: nc_manual_notification now targets only caller — confirmed by tests (managers no longer fan-out). Watch for downstream features (e.g. broadcast announcements) that may have relied on the old fan-out semantics.
All quiet-hours endpoints validated, time/days input validated (400 on malformed), audit events written, midnight-crossing math handles previous-day weekday correctly (verified by helper unit test).
test_credentials: manager@care.local / Manager@123 (and staff@care.local / Staff@123 used for staff-blocked checks within existing G.1 suite)
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seeded manager. Test-created notifications use 'qh_bundle_test_*' / 'qh_break_test_*' / 'qh_ui_bundle_*' event_types so easily identifiable. Tests reset quiet_hours.enabled=false in teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quiet Hours feature is solid end-to-end. The UI exposes data-testids: quiet-hours-panel, quiet-hours-toggle, quiet-hours-start, quiet-hours-end, quiet-hours-day-{0..6}, quiet-hours-apply_to_{in_app,email,sms}, quiet-hours-active-now, quiet-hours-active-banner, quiet-hours-preview, quiet-hours-critical-{key}, bundled-for-digest-banner, notif-bundled-{id}. Manual notifications now scope to caller only — keep in mind for any later broadcast-style features. Email/SMS dispatch remain MOCKED (Resend/Twilio); in-app + audit + bundling logic are REAL.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no issues found. All 9 new quiet-hours tests + 22 regression notif-centre tests pass. Frontend Playwright run confirmed headline copy exactly matches spec ('Protect your downtime while keeping critical safeguarding alerts active.'), no 'disable alerts' phrasing anywhere, active-now pill + amber banner appear when QH window covers now(), bundled-for-digest banner shows correct count, and 7+ critical breakthrough items render.
